data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. Changes correctly introduce three-state repo persistence (specific repo, intentional all-repos, unset) via a localStorage sentinel value. url-state-sync restores both repo and all-repos selections on reload without clobbering view params. repo-switcher bootstrap respects intentional all-repos. All quality gates pass (0 lint errors, 0 type errors, 2239 tests passing, build succeeds). No security issues or regressions.
